generated_categories.name: Basic Validation

generated_categories.description: Tests related to the handling of trailing dots in FQDNs, depending on the `allow_trailing_dot` option.

generated_categories.description: Tests that validate the behavior when wildcards are allowed in FQDNs using the `allow_wildcard` option.

generated_categories.description: Tests that ensure proper handling of top-level domains (TLDs), including their presence and format, based on the `require_tld` option.

generated_categories.name: Numeric TLD Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests that validate the acceptance or rejection of numeric TLDs based on the `allow_numeric_tld` option.

generated_categories.name: Length Constraints
generated_categories.description: Tests that verify the enforcement of length constraints on FQDN parts, such as the maximum length of labels.

generated_categories.name: Underscore Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests that validate the behavior when underscores are allowed or disallowed in FQDNs using the `allow_underscores` option.
